mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xxl_job_registry(registry_group, registry_key, registry_value, update_time) VALUES(#{registryGroup}, #{registryKey}, #{registryValue}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE update_time = #{updateTime}

INSERT INTO xxl_job_registry(registry_group, registry_key, registry_value, update_time) VALUES(#{registryGroup}, #{registryKey}, #{registryValue}, #{updateTime}) ON CONFLICT (lower(registry_group), lower(registry_key), lower(registry_value)) DO UPDATE SET update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM xxl_job_registry WHERE lower(registry_group) = lower(#{registryGroup}) AND lower(registry_key) = lower(#{registryKey}) AND lower(registry_value) = lower(#{registryValue})
DELETE FROM xxl_job_registry WHERE lower(registry_group) = lower(#{registryGroup}) AND lower(registry_key) = lower(#{registryKey})
